# UX Checklist: Provide Partial Results When Some Open Data is Unavailable

**Purpose**: Validate warnings, confidence, and completeness displays.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/028-partial-open-data-results/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Warning Presentation

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Missing-factor list is visible on estimate results.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 High-severity warning appears for low reliability.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Confidence and completeness indicators are displayed.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-004 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Missing data", "Confidence", "Completeness").
- [x] CHK-UX-005 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
